## Realistic Hands Vanilla Minecraft?
![info](https://i.imgur.com/BhicCzB.png) ![info](https://i.imgur.com/EiTamXH.png) ![info](https://i.imgur.com/xOogaBt.png)
### _Yeah, It's cursed.. We know..._

**Realistic Hands** is realistic to a fault, designed to enhance your game with a touch of natural beauty. It's subtle, refined, and compatible with a range of systems.
